text.title: cap-pacelc-walkthrough Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "cap-pacelc-orders-2026-05-23", "owner": "@ruslan", "decision": "orders-service: AP under partition (DynamoDB), EL when healthy", "rationale": "RPO=30s and revenue impact of read unavailability dominates; PACELC choice EL because checkout p95 budget is 80ms; both inputs cited inline", "inputs_used": [ "policy/rpo-rto.md", "observability/orders-read-write-split.json" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "cap_mode": "AP", "pacelc_mode": "EL" }

example.note: owner='team'; cap_mode/pacelc_mode not in enum; inputs_used empty; version not semver.

section.title: Forbidden
section.forbidden: Single-axis output (only CAP, only PACELC) — both axes required by r5.
duplicate artefact_id within the same store.
